headline: Will Falling Gold Production Weigh on Newmont's FY26 Performance?
summary: NEM faces falling gold output and rising costs in 2026 as mine transitions and lower volumes threaten margins despite upbeat earnings estimates.

headline: Agnico Eagle Eclipses 50-day SMA: What Should Investors Do Now?
summary: AEM stock breaks above its 50-day SMA as gold rallies, but rising costs and premium valuation complicate the outlook.

headline: Barrick Mining Corp (B): Outperform Rating Amid Global Gold Expansion
summary: Barrick Mining Corp (NYSE:B) is one of the best gold mining companies to buy with high upside potential. On April 2, analysts at Raymond James lowered their price target on Barrick Mining Corp (NYSE:B) to $61 from $62 while reiterating an Outperform rating. The outperform rating reflects the company’s significant interest in high-quality gold mines […]
